# KAIMEC Machines

> European-built CNC fiber lasers, CNC press brakes, and deep-hole drilling systems, sold factory-direct in the US with engineering and parts support from Tustin, California.

## Pages

- [Home](/): Overview of KAIMEC's CNC fiber lasers, press brakes, and drilling machines.
- [About](/about): Company background, US-based support, and European manufacturing.
- [FAQ](/faq): Common questions about machines, support, and ordering.
- [Request Info / Quote](/quote): Request pricing or specs for a specific machine.
- [Talk to an Expert](/consultation): Book a consultation with a KAIMEC engineer.
- [Quotations](/quotations): Browse machines available for quotation.
- [Dealers](/dealers): Dealer and partner information.

## Machines

- [All Machines](/machines): Full catalog of KAIMEC fabrication machines.
- [CNC Fiber Lasers](/machines/cnc-fiber-lasers): Open and closed-type fiber laser cutting systems.
- [Open Type Fiber Laser](/machines/laser-cutting/open-type-fiber-laser): FLO 1530 / 2040 / 2060 open-frame fiber lasers.
- [Closed Type Fiber Laser](/machines/laser-cutting/closed-type-fiber-laser): FLC 1530 / 2040 / 2060 fully enclosed fiber lasers.
- [Combo Sheet + Pipe Laser](/machines/laser-cutting/covered-pipe-profile-fiber-laser): FLO-P and FLC-P combo sheet and tube/pipe cutting lasers.
- [Tube & Profile Lasers](/machines/tube-profile-lasers): FLP series dedicated tube and profile cutting lasers.
- [CNC Press Brakes](/machines/press-brakes): MKT-series CNC press brakes for sheet bending.
- [Gun Drilling Machines](/gun-drills/gun-drilling-machines): Deep-hole gun drilling systems.
- [BTA Deep Hole Drilling](/gun-drills/bta-deep-hole-drilling): BTA-style deep-hole drilling machines.
